name: vldb-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for VLDB / PVLDB submissions: month picking on the rolling calendar, CMT submission audits, the one-shot revision, PVLDB camera-ready and PDF/A, the Reproducibility Evaluation, scalable-systems experiments, related work, writing style, and venue routing. Grounded in the PVLDB Volume 19/20 submission guidelines, the VLDB 2026/2027 research-track calls, and the pVLDB reproducibility pages checked on 2026-07-08.
